subject: refactor(forecast): simplify to aggregate cashflow, add demo actuals
body:
Forecasting and accuracy now operate on aggregate cashflow (total income
minus total expenses), not per-category breakdowns. Categories/tags are
for interest stats in the Compare tab, not for measuring forecast accuracy.

Changes:
- Remove "Each item / Group by tag" toggle from Forecast tab (items-only)
- Refactor forecast engine: replace generateCategoryForecasts with
  generateCashflowForecast (aggregate), replace groupActualsByCategoryMonth
  with groupActualsByMonth (aggregate)
- Refactor accuracy engine: remove per-category/per-method breakdowns,
  track aggregate daily forecast vs actual only
- Add 23 demo actuals to seedDemoWorkspace (previous month's transactions)
  with realistic SA merchant names, amounts varying from budget, and 2
  unbudgeted actuals — so chart, compare, and accuracy features are
  visible on first visit

Tags: forecast, accuracy, demo, cleanup, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: forecasting-enhancement
Semver: minor
